title: Decide whether the .excn work-tracking set stays gitignored (issues should be visible in-repo)
description: The Scaffolder stamps .excn/.gitignore (src/template/.excn/gitignore, restored at stamp time) ignoring sprints/, issues/, prds/, retros/, *_progress.json. A gitignored backlog can't be seen, reviewed, or shared from the repo. Decide (HITL, Brooks): version-control the full set, keep status quo, or a middle path tracking issues/ (maybe prds/, sprints/) while keeping *_progress.json and retros/ ignored. Changes the Scaffolder's invariant layout and brushes the JSON-for-progress Principle, so record the decision as an ADR; a Principle-level change also routes through the alignment gate. Src-First: src/template/.excn/gitignore changes first, root Instance mirrors. Fix while here: root .excn/.gitignore also ignores drafts/, which the shipped template does not.
acceptance_criteria: An ADR records the decision with the trade-off (visible/reviewable backlog vs. ephemeral-state noise)
src/template/.excn/gitignore implements the decision and the root .excn/.gitignore mirrors it
package-qa passes on the stamp contract
fix: ADR-0005; template gitignore = *_progress.json only, root mirrors, drafts/ removed; package-qa PASS.
notes: Filed 2026-06-10 (Brooks). Owner: builder; ADR + alignment gate for the Principle brush.
